deals-nav-pipeline-v2.png.note: Reshoot 2026-07-17 of the Sales > Pipeline > Deals-tab orientation shot. Original deals-nav-pipeline.png (Apr 16) showed an unhidden 'Staging Test Brand' chip in the brand switcher -- disallowed seed-data blemish. Same technique as set-up-your-brand-and-team-overview-v2: chip hidden via display:none (not renamed) to avoid an icon/label mismatch. Cropped to 760x700 CSS (1520x1400 raw @2x) to exclude the newer 'Lead' column (added to the Deals table since April), which now surfaces seed lead names not relevant to this shot. dom-sanitize run with freshenDates:false. Cursor arrow on the Deals tab. SUPERSEDED 2026-07-17: this fix missed the 'Knowledge Base' staging-only sidebar item, which was still visible -- see deals-nav-pipeline-v3.png.

deals-nav-pipeline-v3.png.note: Reshoot 2026-07-17 of deals-nav-pipeline-v2.png, which still showed the staging-only 'Knowledge Base' sidebar item (isDevOrStaging()-gated, never in production). Same route (Sales > Pipeline > Deals tab), same 760x700 CSS crop (1520x1400 raw @2x), same cursor arrow on the Deals tab. Knowledge Base hidden via display:none on its nav-item container (text-match walk, defensive re-apply after dom-sanitize per the mandatory React-revert pattern). dom-sanitize run with freshenDates:false; no PII in frame (deal names are generic seed labels 'Deal N'). No 'Staging Test Brand' chip present under this login (brand switcher shows Lumon Fresh + Kharcho Kings as individual chips instead of a collapsed 'Other Brands' badge -- cosmetic difference from the account used for v2, not a blemish).
